## Meeting Purpose

[Impromptu check-in and strategic discussion between Jose Francisco and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) on content strategy, personal safety, and career growth.](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Safety concerns in public spaces prompted discussion on personal protection measures](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Content strategy shift: focus on scaling through hiring, automation, and programmatic opinion insertion](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Career growth for Jose: evolve from operator to orchestrator, becoming an external authority in the "voice economy"](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating breathing room for strategic thinking and self-improvement](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)

## Topics

### Recent Safety Incident

  - [Marcel shared a concerning encounter with an aggressive homeless person during a meeting](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Discussed personal safety measures: pepper spray, loud noise devices](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Emphasized the importance of being prepared in unpredictable urban environments](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)

### Content Strategy and Google Algorithm Updates

  - [Site experienced traffic dip due to Google policy changes](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Jose working on:](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Automating content updates to adapt to Google's ranking changes](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [White papers for Josh](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Thought leadership piece for Scott (ghostwriting)](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Marcel suggested:](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [Introducing programmatic opinions to enrich content](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [Updating AI app content with improved workflows (current catalog uses outdated 12-month-old prompts)](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Scaling Content Creation and Demos

  - [Discussion on how to produce more demo content similar to Adam's recent post](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Strategies proposed:](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [Recruit influencers or developers who have built with the API](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [Explore university partnerships (Stanford, Berkeley) for talent or fellowships](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Potentially open a new position for full-time demo creation](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Jose to reach out to:](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
      - [Twitter contacts and personal connections](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [Damien for potential hackathon connections](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Andy (current writer) to shift focus to tutorial/demo content](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)

### Career Development for Jose

  - [Marcel emphasized the importance of:](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Creating breathing room for strategic thinking](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [Finding ways to "write yourself out of your job" by delegating and systemizing](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [Evolving from operator to orchestrator](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Ideal 6-month vision for Jose:](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
      - [Become an external authority in the "voice economy"](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [Deepen expertise while widening distribution and influence](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [Transition to a role where startup founders seek Jose's advice](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [Apply expertise to create cool, useful, and helpful content/projects](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)

### Team Dynamics and Personal Well-being

  - [Jose expressed appreciation for Marcel's trust and hands-off approach](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Discussed need for eventual vacation time](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Marcel encouraged creating space for strategic thinking and idea generation](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jose to reach out to Andy about shifting focus to demo/tutorial content](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Explore recruiting options for scaling demo and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Jose to connect with Twitter contacts and personal network for potential collaborators](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Consider creating a centralized page/article showcasing all demo projects](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Jose to reflect on personal career goals and transition from operator to orchestrator](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare for potential increased investment appetite, planning for scalable growth](https://fathom.video/share/tiT8mnYAxN-Y7JbrWs77zDRi7P_yBRCC?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
